## Cross-Check Status

- [ ] Every served story's ACs reachable.
- [ ] Every field has SRS or new-requirement backing.
- [ ] Every error/empty state described in SRS or added as new requirement.
- [ ] Glossary terms used consistently.

If any unchecked box exists, the screen must stay in `draft` or `review`,
not `agreed`.

- YYYY-MM-DD: created.
